name: Switch

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible name for the switch button, exposed via aria-label. Recommended for icon-only switches that have no visible text. If omitted but OnLabel/OffLabel are set, the current one is used automatically so screen readers announce the switch's purpose.

parameters.name: Animated
parameters.description: When true, the thumb animates with a bouncy spring cubic-bezier timing instead of the default linear transition. Default is false.

mdSummary:
# Switch

Toggle switch for boolean settings.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Specialized
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/switch

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Switch | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| Switch | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| Switch | Invalid | `bool` | `` |  |
| Switch | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Switch | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Switch | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| Switch | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| Switch | Checked | `bool` | `` |  |
| Switch | CheckedChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| Switch | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| Switch | Loading | `bool` | `` |  |
| Switch | OnLabel | `string?` | `` |  |
| Switch | OffLabel | `string?` | `` |  |
| Switch | AriaLabel | `string?` | `` | Accessible name for the switch button, exposed via aria-label. Recommended for icon-only switches that have no visible text. If omitted but OnLabel/OffLabel are set, the current one is used automatically so screen readers announce the switch's purpose. |
| Switch | Size | `SwitchSize` | `SwitchSize.Default` |  |
| Switch | Animated | `bool` | `` | When true, the thumb animates with a bouncy spring cubic-bezier timing instead of the default linear transition. Default is false. |
| Switch | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Switch | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `CheckedChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Switch />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`
